meaning: n.首都,首府,大写字母,资本,资金,资产adj.首都的,重要的,死罪的,大写的,<口>极好的
examples: Cairo is the capital of Egypt.
Everything in the capital is now quiet.
The capital city is swarming with police.
The folk at Capital Economics have started to use another word for it: Recession.
For 2002, Weiner estimates a 20% drop in capital spending for the semiconductor industry.
